DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS ENRIQUE PEDROZA AND LAILA PORTUGAL'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCO RESPONSES -THE COURT FINDS THAT IT IS APPROPRIATE TO APPOINT A DISCOVERY REFEREE FOR THIS CASE. THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MEET AND CONFER AND ATTEMPT TO MUTUALLY AGREE UPON AN INDIVIDUAL WHO CAN BE APPOINTED BY THE COURT AS THE DISCOVERY REFEREE. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR PENDING A HEARING BEFORE THE DISCOVERY REFEREE. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. DAVID MCDONALD, JUDGE PRO-TEM, NOT REPORTED.

THE PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO MEET AND CONFER AND ATTEMPT TO MUTUALLY AGREE UPON AN INDIVIDUAL WHO CAN BE APPOINTED BY THE COURT AS THE DISCOVERY REFEREE.
